name: Supriya Sankaran
body: Supriya is the co-founder of Agami and of PUCAR itself, working to transform how every Indian experiences justice. Through the Agami Prize, Agami Challenges, and AgamiShaala she has spent years unleashing changemakers in law and justice. Before Agami she was a Director at Ashoka Innovators for the Public, and she started out as a corporate lawyer.
